name: Maximilian and Marie De Bourgogne
original_name: Maximilian - Das Spiel von Macht und Liebe
overview: Known as The Last Knight for his bravery and battle skills, the great European emperor Maximilian and his story is as spectacular as it is familiar: It is the story of a prince who must learn to be king. But above all, it is the struggle of a son who steps out of his father's shadow with the help of a most unexpected ally: Marie de Bourgogne.

trailers.title: Maximilian - Das Spiel von Macht und Liebe (2017) | Trailer with English Subtitles
